player.description: Magical guardian flower plant character, top-down view, glowing enchanted sunflower with green leaf armor, golden petals

enemy.description: Evil garden pest beetle enemy, top-down view, dark chitinous shell with crimson red markings, menacing mandibles

boss.description: Giant corrupted moth boss creature, massive dark wings with toxic purple-green patterns, demonic moth boss

petal.description: Magical glowing petal collectible, pink-magenta luminous flower petal with sparkle effects

seed.description: Enchanted seed power-up item, golden seed with green sparkle aura

token.description: Mystic Garden Token MGT coin icon for CrossRamp

playerBullet.description: Magical thorn projectile, green-gold glowing thorn spike with magical energy trail, pointing upward

enemyBullet.description: Toxic poison orb enemy projectile, purple-green poisonous bubble with dark energy

forest.description: Enchanted forest background for vertical scrolling, lush green canopy, magical mushrooms, glowing fireflies
